testcase.name: shouldReturnBackendHealthStatus
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-27T11:40:47.543+08:00 INFO 26732 --- [pvms-backend] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [cn.techstar.pvms.backend.module.system.controller.SystemHealthControllerTest]: SystemHealthControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-27T11:40:47.557+08:00 INFO 26732 --- [pvms-backend] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration cn.techstar.pvms.backend.PvmsBackendApplication for test class cn.techstar.pvms.backend.module.system.controller.SystemHealthControllerTest
